title: Jbass
compiled_truth: Jbass is an external contact at [Stdauto](companies/stdauto). Over the corpus period (2001-02-21 to 2002-01-25), Jbass sent 17 and received 45 emails, totalling 62 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (15), [Bass' 'Larry](people/bass-larry) (2), [Bass Jason](people/bass-jason) (1), [Bass K ](people/bass-k) (1), [Smacfarland](people/smacfarland-gpch) (1).
